# RaiSE

> Reliable AI Software Engineering — methodology + toolkit for professional developers using AI assistants.

## Docs

- [Getting Started](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/getting-started/): Install and first session
- [CLI Reference](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/cli/): All rai commands
- [CLI: init](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/cli/init/): Initialize projects
- [CLI: session](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/cli/session/): Manage sessions
- [CLI: graph](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/cli/graph/): Knowledge graph
- [CLI: pattern](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/cli/pattern/): Learned patterns
- [CLI: signal](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/cli/signal/): Lifecycle signals
- [CLI: backlog](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/cli/backlog/): Backlog management
- [CLI: skill](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/cli/skill/): Skill management
- [CLI: discover](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/cli/discover/): Codebase discovery
- [CLI: adapter](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/cli/adapter/): Adapter management
- [CLI: mcp](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/cli/mcp/): MCP servers
- [CLI: gate](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/cli/gate/): Workflow gates
- [CLI: doctor](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/cli/doctor/): Diagnostics
- [CLI: docs](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/cli/docs/): Documentation targets
- [CLI: artifact](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/cli/artifact/): Skill artifacts
- [CLI: release](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/cli/release/): Release management
- [CLI: info](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/cli/info/): Package info
- [CLI: profile](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/cli/profile/): Developer profile

## Concepts

- [Governance](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/concepts/governance/): Governance as code
- [Knowledge Graph](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/concepts/knowledge-graph/): Memory and context
- [Skills](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/concepts/skills/): Structured AI workflows

## Guides

- [First Story](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/guides/first-story/): Complete your first story
- [Setting Up](https://docs.raiseframework.ai/docs/guides/setting-up/): Project setup guide

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/humansys/raise): Source code
- [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/rai-cli/): Python package
